title: Editorial Newsprint
summary: Sunday-supplement editorial idiom on cream paper with ink-black hairlines and a gold rule; 5-dock rail opens five dedicated panes.
flow: Left rail of 5 docks; each opens a dedicated swap pane styled like a newspaper table-of-contents page.

title: Linear Onyx
summary: Matte near-black surface with subpixel hairlines and a single indigo to fuchsia gradient accent; 2-dock rail with Sites segments and 5-tab Manage pane.
flow: Left rail of 2 docks (Sites, Manage); Sites pane has 3 segments (Yours / New / Library), Manage pane has 5 tabs (Settings / Files / Blueprint / Database / Logs).

title: Solar Marigold
summary: Brand-forward marigold and warm brown ink on bone paper, 1970s product-manual mood with chunky 2px borders; 5-dock rail opens five dedicated panes.
flow: Left rail of 5 docks (Sites, Site Manager, Blueprint, Database, Logs); each opens its own dedicated swap pane styled like a Helvetica-era product manual page.

title: Tokyo Twilight
summary: Deep indigo ground with restrained neon plum and cool cyan; calm urban night palette over the v7 quiet rail with a Sites + Manage 2-dock segmented pane.
flow: Left rail of 2 docks (Sites, Manage). Sites pane has 3 segments (Yours / New / Library); Manage pane has 5 tabs (Settings / Files / Blueprint / Database / Logs). Floating diamond top capsule; glow-dot corner widget; dark library overlay with category sidebar.

title: Carbon Lab
summary: IBM Carbon Design System idiom: white base, Gray 100 ink, Blue 60 accent, strict 0px corners, dense data tables. 5-dock rail opens 5 dedicated panes.
flow: Left rail of 5 square Carbon dock icons; each opens a dedicated swap pane. Site Manager Settings rendered as a Carbon Data Table.

title: Risograph Pulp
summary: Duotone risograph print on bone paper: fluorescent pink + powder blue, off-register hairlines, halftone ornament. Pane groups Sites, Inspect (Files+Blueprint), Runtime (DB+Logs).
flow: Locked v7 #010 IA — left rail with 3 grouped docks; Inspect groups Files+Blueprint, Runtime groups Database+Logs.

title: Cafe Latte
summary: Warm cream paper, espresso ink and caramel accents; 2-dock rail with Manage pane that pins Settings on top and tabs Files/Blueprint/Database/Logs as Inspect.
flow: Two-dock rail (Sites, Manage); Manage pane shows a compact Settings summary always pinned at the top with a 4-tab Inspect section beneath.

title: Vellum Sage
summary: A scholarly vellum-and-sage idiom: cream paper, ink-green hairlines with leaf end-caps, hand-set Garamond labels, and a wax-seal corner widget. 5-dock rail.
flow: Left rail of 5 hand-set initial docks; each opens its own quiet vellum pane. Library overlay reads like a card catalogue.

title: Bauhaus Primary
summary: Bauhaus geometric idiom: primary red/yellow/blue on bright off-white with pure black 3px borders. 5-dock rail of colored geometric chips opens five dedicated swap panes.
flow: Left rail of 5 colored geometric chips (red square, yellow triangle, blue circle, black bar, red dot) opens five dedicated swap panes; black slab capsule; primary-color flag corner widget; library is a grid of primary-color blocks.

title: Architectural Blueprint
summary: Drafting-table technical drawing on dark navy with a cyan blueprint grid; 3 dock icons (Sites, Inspector, Telemetry) with leader-line annotations.
flow: Left rail of 3 docks (Sites / Inspector / Telemetry); pane reads as a callout window on a blueprint with dimension text and leader lines.

title: Pastel Macaron
summary: Rose, mint, lavender and butter pastels on warm white; 2-dock rail with Sites segments and a 5-tab candy-pill Manage pane.
flow: Two-dock rail (Sites, Manage); Sites pane has Yours/New/Library segments, Manage pane has 5 candy-pill tabs (Settings/Files/Blueprint/Database/Logs).

title: Forest Botanical
summary: Quiet rail rendered as a field-guide. Emerald + ochre + cream, Newsreader serif, hand-drawn leaf ornaments, 5-dock pane arrangement and an olivewood top capsule.
flow: Left rail (5 docks) opens one swap pane; olivewood capsule, botanical sticker corner widget, field-guide modal library.

title: Top Tab Strip · Graphite
summary: Rail rotated 90 degrees to the top — 5 horizontal tabs above the iframe. Pane drops down from the top edge. Monochrome graphite with a single moss-green accent.
flow: Top tab strip (5 tabs) replaces the left rail; pane is a 40%-tall overlay sliding down from the iframe's top edge.

title: Right Rail · Brass
summary: Oxidized brass and bottle green chrome with the quiet rail mirrored to the right; pane swings open leftward so the eye lands on the rail after the address bar.
flow: Right-mounted quiet rail with 2 docks (Sites, Manage); pane swings open to the LEFT of the rail. Capsule and corner widget stay at left.

title: Floating Dock · Aurora
summary: Liquid-glass aurora skin with an unpinned macOS-style dock floating bottom-center of the iframe; pane is a translucent sheet anchored to the dock.
flow: Rail unpinned as a floating dock at bottom-center; pane appears as a frosted sheet anchored above the active dock icon.

title: Corner-Pinned Tools · Mono Brutalist
summary: Brutalist mono — no rail. Four floating CORNER CHIPS on the iframe (Library/Manage/Sites/Logs) feed the same single secondary pane, anchored to the chip's corner.
flow: No rail. Four chips pinned to each iframe corner; the single secondary pane anchors near the active chip's corner.

title: Bottom Inspector Dock · DevTools
summary: Chrome DevTools-style bottom dock. Iframe takes the top 65 percent, the inspector dock 35 percent and is resizable. Rail rotates into a horizontal tab strip inside the dock.
flow: Bottom inspector dock replaces the rail. Six tabs (Sites, Settings, Files, Blueprint, DB, Logs) live in a horizontal tab strip across the top of the dock; a drag handle resizes the iframe/dock split.

title: Command Palette First · Terminal Phosphor
summary: CRT phosphor-green palette is the primary IA. The rail collapses to two buttons (Site, Library); everything else is reachable through a persistent Cmd+K palette that drives the one secondary pane.
flow: Palette-first IA. Top-center Cmd+K bar expands to a full-width categorized command palette (Start, Manage, Action). The two-button rail (Site, Library) only handles the workspace home and the modal blueprint catalogue; the pane is whatever the palette routed.

title: Split-Rail Twin Pane (Mondrian)
summary: Mondrian primary-block idiom: yellow rail strip with two icons (red Launch, blue Inspect) commits one swap-pane to one of two modes; thick 4-6px black grid lines.
flow: 2-icon always-on slim left rail in a yellow strip — top red Launch square commits pane to Sites/Start/Library; bottom blue Inspect square commits pane to a 5-tab Site Manager (Settings/Files/Blueprint/Database/Logs). Pane dimensions never change.

title: Bottom Sheet IA · Sunset Coral
summary: Persistent bottom sheet replaces the side pane. Iframe takes the top 60 percent, sheet 40 percent (draggable to 75 percent). Rail rotates into a thin top-edge tab strip with handle.
visualIdiom: sunset coral (peach, coral, warm sand, navy ink)
flow: The bottom sheet IS the pane. Five tabs live in the top-edge strip (Sites, Settings, Files, Blueprint, Runtime), with Runtime grouping Database + Logs as two sub-tabs. A 40px drag handle hints the sheet can be pulled up to 75 percent.
